violations.title: Reauthentication Required
violations.description: Route POST /api/users/:id/unlock does not verify that the session was created within the last 30 minutes.
violations.condition: actor.type == 'AuthenticatedUser' AND Session.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL(30, minutes)
violations.fix_hint: Add middleware to verify Session.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL(30, minutes) before the route handler.
